briefdescription.para: Maximum index for XOSC clock IDs.
DFLL48M (48 MHz Digital Frequency Locked Loop) clock ID.
Maximum index for DFLL48M clock IDs.
Maximum index for DPLL clock IDs.
Maximum index for DPLL output clock IDs.
Maximum index for RTC clock IDs.
Maximum index for XOSC32K clock IDs.
Maximum index for Generic Clock Generator IDs.
GCLK Peripheral ID: Frequency Meter Measure.
GCLK Peripheral ID: Frequency Meter Reference.
GCLK Peripheral ID: External Interrupt Controller (EIC).
GCLK Peripheral ID: Event System Channel 0.
GCLK Peripheral ID: Event System Channel 1.
GCLK Peripheral ID: Event System Channel 2.
GCLK Peripheral ID: Event System Channel 3.
GCLK Peripheral ID: Event System Channel 4.
GCLK Peripheral ID: Event System Channel 5.
GCLK Peripheral ID: Event System Channel 6.
GCLK Peripheral ID: Event System Channel 7.
GCLK Peripheral ID: Event System Channel 8.
GCLK Peripheral ID: Event System Channel 9.
GCLK Peripheral ID: Event System Channel 10.
GCLK Peripheral ID: Event System Channel 11.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM0 Slow clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM1 Slow clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM4 Slow clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM2 Slow clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM3 Slow clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM5 Slow clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM6 Slow clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM7 Slow clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM8 Slow clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM9 Slow clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM0 Core clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM1 Core clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM2 Core clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM3 Core clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM4 Core clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM5 Core clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM6 Core clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM7 Core clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM8 Core clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: SERCOM9 Core clock.
GCLK Peripheral ID: PTC (Peripheral Touch Controller).
Maximum index for GCLK Peripheral IDs.
Maximum index for Main Clock Domain IDs.
Maximum index for MCLK Peripheral IDs.

detaileddescription.para: Encodes the clock subsystem type, MCLK bus information, GCLK peripheral channel, and instance number into a single 32-bit identifier.

Bit field layout:
00..07 (8 bits): inst
08..13 (6 bits): gclkperiph (values from 0 to 47)
14..19 (6 bits): mclkmaskbit (values from 0 to 31)
20..25 (6 bits): mclkmaskreg following values MCLKMSK0 (0) MCLKMSK1 (1) MCLKMSK2 (2)
26..31 (6 bits): type following values SUBSYS_TYPE_XOSC (0) SUBSYS_TYPE_DFLL48M (1) SUBSYS_TYPE_DPLL (2) SUBSYS_TYPE_DPLL_OUT (3) SUBSYS_TYPE_RTC (4) SUBSYS_TYPE_XOSC32K (5) SUBSYS_TYPE_GCLKGEN (6) SUBSYS_TYPE_GCLKPERIPH (7) SUBSYS_TYPE_MCLKDOMAIN (8) SUBSYS_TYPE_MCLKPERIPH (9)

parameterdescription.para: select from the AHBx and the APBx buses
select the module connected to AHBx or APBx bus (0 to 31)
gclk peripheral channel number m in PCHTRLm (0 to 63)
instance number of the specified clock type

briefdescription.para: List clock subsystem IDs for pic32cz_ca family.

detaileddescription.para: Clock subsystem IDs. To be used in devicetree nodes, and as argument for clock API.
